w:r.w:t: Covers All Pages · All Features · All User Flows

A full-featured online and home tutoring marketplace that connects students and parents with verified tutors across Pakistan and internationally. It handles the complete lifecycle: discovery → booking → session delivery → payment → review.
This is a two-sided marketplace platform with three user types: Students/Parents, Tutors, and Admins. Each user type has a dedicated workflow, dashboard, and set of permissions.
Search, filter, browse, compare tutor profiles
Session scheduling, calendar, availability, trial booking
Secure payments, invoices, refunds, earning tracking
Post-session reviews, star ratings, tutor ranking
Full platform control, analytics, tutor verification
Blog, FAQ, subject pages, promotional banners
First impression page. Converts visitors into leads by showcasing services, building trust, and driving users to take action (book trial or submit inquiry).
Logo, nav links, CTA buttons remain visible on scroll. Collapses to hamburger on mobile. Links anchor-scroll to sections on same page.
Full-width section with headline, subheadline, two CTA buttons (Find Tutor / Free Trial), and animated counter stats (500+ Tutors, 5000+ Students).
4 clickable service cards (Online Tutoring, Home Tuition, O/A Level, Writing). Each has icon, title, description, arrow link.
Horizontal 5-step visual process: Inquiry → Screening → Choose → Demo → Start. Each step numbered with icon.
6 feature icons with labels: Free Trial, Verified Tutors, 1-on-1, All Grades, Male & Female, Flexible.
Clickable tag cloud for all subjects. Clicking a subject filters tutor listing page.
Auto-sliding cards with student photo, stars, name, review. Pause on hover. Swipe on mobile.
Dark background section recruiting tutors with a "Register as Tutor" button.
6 expandable questions. Clicking opens answer, collapses others.
Fixed floating WhatsApp icon (bottom-right). Opens WhatsApp chat with pre-filled message.
Logo, tagline, 3 link columns, phone, email, social icons, copyright.
Core discovery page where students browse, search, and filter tutors to find the right match.
Live search by tutor name, subject, or keyword. Results update in real-time as user types.
Multi-select filters: Subject, Grade, Board, Gender, City, Mode (Online/Home), Price Range slider, Availability toggle.
Applied filters shown as dismissible chips above results. "Clear All" button resets filters.
Shows "Showing 48 Tutors" count. Sort dropdown: Newest, Top Rated, Price Low-High, Price High-Low.
3-column grid (1 on mobile). Card shows: photo, verified badge, name, qualification, subject tags, rating, per-hour rate, city, mode badges, two action buttons.
Hover/click shows a popup with tutor summary without leaving the page.
Checkbox on cards lets users select up to 3 tutors and compare side by side in a modal table.
Load more tutors as user scrolls. Page numbers shown at bottom.
If no tutors match, shows friendly message + suggestion to adjust filters or contact support.
Detailed page for each tutor. Allows students to assess the tutor fully and take action (book or message).
Large photo, name, verification badge, rating, qualification, subject tags, city, hourly rate, availability status.
Tutor-written bio paragraph. Expandable if long.
Subjects, Grades, Boards covered, Years of Experience, Language of Instruction, Teaching Mode.
Degree, institution, year in vertical timeline format.
Weekly grid showing available (green), booked (grey), unavailable (red) slots. Student can click a slot to initiate booking.
Select date, time slot, session duration (1hr / 1.5hr), see calculated price, then click Book Now.
Prominent CTA for first-time students. Triggers trial booking flow.
Opens in-app message thread with that tutor.
One-click WhatsApp link to tutor directly.
List of verified reviews with reviewer photo, name, date, stars, text. Sorted by most recent.
Share button generates a link to the tutor profile.
Explains each service in detail. Helps undecided visitors understand options and choose the right service.
Each of 4 services has alternating image+text layout. Includes heading, description, bullet benefits, CTA.
Feature vs service checkmark grid for quick comparison of what each service includes.
Boards and levels covered per service (Matric, O Level, A Level, Cambridge, Edexcel, IGCSE).
Lists: Research Papers, Thesis, Assignments, Dissertations, Proofreading, Plagiarism Removal.
"Not sure which service? Talk to our team" with WhatsApp and Call buttons.
Converts interested visitors into confirmed leads. Collects all info needed to match the right tutor.
Step 1: Personal Info. Step 2: Subject & Level. Step 3: Schedule & Budget. Step 4: Confirmation.
Visual bar showing current step (1/2/3/4) with fill animation.
Full Name, Email, Phone (with country code picker), City (dropdown), Student or Parent toggle.
Subject multiselect tags (tap to select), Grade/Class dropdown, Board (radio), Tutor Gender preference, Mode (Online/Home/Both).
Day-of-week checkbox grid, Time preference (Morning/Afternoon/Evening), Budget range slider (PKR).
Inline error messages on each field. Cannot proceed to next step with empty required fields.
Success illustration, "Our team will contact you within 2 hours", WhatsApp quick chat button.
On submission, system sends auto-confirmation to student email + WhatsApp alert to admin.
Left side shows trust badges, tutor count, and 2-3 testimonial quotes to reduce form abandonment.
Recruits qualified tutors to join the platform. Collects tutor applications and credentials.
Headline, subheadline, 4 benefit cards: Flexible Hours, Work from Home, Competitive Pay, Free Listing.
3-step horizontal flow: Register → Verification → Get Students.
Minimum qualifications listed with checkmarks: degree, subject knowledge, internet, communication skills.
Name, Email, Phone, City, Qualification (dropdown), Subjects (multi-select), Mode preference, CV/Degree upload (file input), Bio textarea.
File input accepts PDF, JPG, PNG up to 5MB. Shows file name after upload. Remove option.
3 cards with tutor photo, name, subject, quote about earnings.
"Questions? WhatsApp us" sticky at bottom with direct link.
After submit: success screen with expected review time (24-48 hours) and what happens next.
Shows transparent pricing. Removes cost uncertainty to convert hesitant visitors.
Switch button changes displayed pricing between Online and Home tuition rates.
Basic, Standard (highlighted as Most Popular), Premium. Each shows per-hour rate, included features, CTA button.
"All plans include" section: Free Trial, Verified Tutors, Flexible Schedule, Cancel Anytime.
"Need a custom plan? Contact us" link for bulk/institutional packages.
5 accordion questions: payment methods, refund policy, billing cycle, price negotiation.
Small text: "Prices may vary by tutor qualification and subject complexity."
PKR / USD toggle for international visitors.
Provides all contact channels and a form for direct inquiries.
3 cards: Call Us (phone icon + number), WhatsApp (green icon + number), Email Us (email icon).
Full Name, Email, Phone, City, Subject of Inquiry (dropdown), Message textarea, Submit button.
Shows office location(s) on interactive map. Click to open in Google Maps.
Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, YouTube icons with links.
Success message after form submit. Error message if failed.
Reduces support load by answering common questions. Improves SEO with long-form Q&A content.
Filter FAQs in real-time by keyword. Matching questions highlighted.
Tabs: All, For Students, For Parents, For Tutors, Pricing, Technical. Click to filter.
Each FAQ item: question (bold, clickable), answer (collapses/expands with animation). Only one open at a time.
"Still have questions?" card on right with WhatsApp, Call, Email buttons.
"Didn't find your answer? Contact our team" full-width call to action.
FAQ schema markup added for Google rich snippets.
Builds brand trust and humanizes the platform. Explains mission, team, and track record.
Founding story paragraph with company illustration.
Vertical or horizontal timeline: Founded → First 1000 Students → Online Launch → International Expansion.
Two side-by-side cards with icon, title, and paragraph.
4 animated counters on navy background: Tutors, Students, Cities, Success Rate.
4-6 team member cards: photo, name, role, LinkedIn icon.
4 badges: Verified Tutors, Free Trial, Safe Payments, 24/7 Support.
"Start Learning Today" with Find Tutor button.
Email + phone signup. OTP verification on phone. Email verification link sent. Profile setup wizard after signup.
Separate tutor signup flow with form for qualifications, subjects, photo, documents. Pending admin approval state.
Login with Google or Facebook. Links to existing account if email matches.
Forgot password → email link → reset form. Link expires in 24 hours.
Edit photo, name, contact, preferences. Change password. Notification settings toggle.
User can request account deletion. 30-day grace period before permanent removal.
Search by name, subject, board. Powered by full-text search with fuzzy matching.
Subject, Grade, Board, Gender, City, Mode (Online/Home), Price Range, Rating, Availability.
Save a filter combination. Get notified when new tutors match.
Select up to 3 tutors. Side-by-side comparison modal with all details.
Bookmark/favourite tutors. Saved to user profile under "Shortlisted Tutors".
Last 5 viewed tutor profiles shown in student dashboard.
2-day free trial for any new student-tutor pair. One trial per tutor. Auto-expires after 2 sessions.
Select date from tutor availability calendar. Pick time slot. Choose duration. Confirm & pay.
Book weekly recurring sessions (e.g. every Monday 5pm). Auto-generates future bookings.
Cancel up to 24hrs before. Auto-refund if cancelled early. No refund for late cancellations.
Both tutor and student can request reschedule. Other party must approve. System logs reschedule history.
If student is unsatisfied after trial, admin assigns a replacement tutor from matched pool.
Tutor sets weekly recurring availability + blocks specific dates/times. Real-time calendar sync.
JazzCash, EasyPaisa, Bank Transfer, Credit/Debit Card, PayPal (international).
SSL encrypted. PCI-compliant gateway. No card data stored on platform servers.
Auto-generated PDF invoice for every payment. Downloadable from student dashboard.
Tutor sees total earned, pending, paid out. Filter by date range. Download statement.
Admin processes tutor payouts weekly. Marks payments as "sent". Tutor gets notification.
Student requests refund. Admin reviews. Approved refunds processed within 3-5 business days.
System auto-deducts platform % from each booking. Configurable per admin.
Every CTA links to WhatsApp with pre-filled message. Admin and tutors reachable on WhatsApp.
Direct message thread between student and tutor. Supports text, file attachments, images.
Triggered emails for: registration, booking confirmation, cancellation, reminder, review request, payment receipt.
Session reminder SMS 1 hour before. Booking confirmation SMS.
Mobile app push notifications for all key events.
Admin can send bulk message/email to all students or all tutors.
Integrated video call (Zoom/Google Meet link auto-generated per session). Shown to both parties at session time.
Real-time collaborative whiteboard during online sessions.
Session recorded (with both parties' consent). Available in student dashboard for 30 days.
Tutor uploads PDFs, notes, worksheets per student. Student downloads from dashboard.
Tutor assigns homework via platform. Student marks as done. Tutor reviews submission.
Tutor writes session summary/notes after each session. Visible to student and parent.
System logs join/leave time for each session. Admin can view attendance reports.
After each session, student receives automated review request (email + in-app).
Rating affects tutor's average shown on profile and search ranking.
Student writes text review. Tutor can post one public reply.
Admin can hide/delete inappropriate reviews. Flagging system for both parties.
Only students who completed a session can leave a review. "Verified" badge shown.
Total users, bookings, revenue, active tutors. Graphs for weekly/monthly trends.
Review submitted tutor applications. View documents, approve or reject with reason.
View all bookings. Filter by status (pending, active, completed, cancelled). Manual intervention option.
View all students and tutors. Edit profiles, suspend accounts, reset passwords.
Edit homepage banners, FAQ content, service descriptions, blog posts.
Export user list, booking report, revenue report to CSV/Excel.
A student or parent finds the right tutor and successfully books a paid or free trial session.
Student arrives via Google Ad, referral, or direct link. Sees hero banner with "Find a Tutor" and "Free Trial" CTAs.
Types subject or grade in search bar OR clicks a subject tag. Redirected to Tutor Listing page filtered by that selection.
Refines results using sidebar: selects Gender (Female), Mode (Online), City (Lahore), Price Range (PKR 500-900/hr).
Browses tutor cards. Reads name, qualification, rating, rate. Clicks "View Profile" on a preferred tutor.
Reads tutor bio, education, subjects, reviews. Checks availability calendar. Decides to book free trial.
Clicks "Book Free Trial". If not logged in → redirected to registration/login page. If logged in → opens booking widget.
If new user: fills registration form (Name, Email, Phone, OTP). If existing: logs in with email+password or Google.
Booking widget shows tutor availability calendar. Student picks date and available time slot. Clicks "Confirm Trial".
System creates trial booking record. Sends confirmation email + WhatsApp to student. Sends notification to tutor.
Tutor gets email + app notification: "New trial request from [Name] for [Subject] on [Date/Time]". Tutor accepts or proposes new time.
At session time, both parties receive Zoom/Meet link. Session takes place (up to 2 trial sessions allowed).
After trial: Student decides to continue OR request replacement OR end. System sends "How was your trial?" review prompt.
Student selects session frequency (1x/week, 2x/week), recurring day/time. Proceeds to payment.
Student pays via JazzCash, EasyPaisa, card, or bank transfer. System confirms payment. Invoice auto-generated and emailed.
System auto-sends reminders 1hr before each session. Sessions logged in dashboard. Notes uploaded after each.
After each completed session, student is prompted to leave a star rating + written review.
A qualified teacher successfully registers, gets verified, and starts receiving student bookings.
Tutor finds the platform via Google, social media, or referral. Lands on "Work as a Tutor" page.
Reviews: Flexible Hours, Work From Home, PKR earnings per session, Free profile listing.
Enters: Full Name, Email, Phone, City, Qualification, Subjects, Teaching Mode, Short Bio.
Uploads: Degree certificate, CNIC/passport photo, profile photo. Max 5MB per file. PDF/JPG accepted.
Clicks "Submit Application". System stores application in Admin panel with "Pending" status.
System sends auto email: "We received your application. Expected review: 24-48 hours."
Admin opens tutor application. Reviews documents, qualification, subjects. Checks for completeness.
Admin clicks Approve (sends welcome email + login credentials) OR Reject (sends rejection email with reason + option to reapply).
Approved tutor logs in for first time. Prompted to: complete profile, set availability, set per-hour rate, write bio.
After setup, tutor profile is published and appears in search results. Tutor receives "Your profile is live!" email.
When a student books a trial, tutor gets notification. Tutor accepts/declines from dashboard.
Tutor conducts sessions. Earnings accumulate in dashboard. Admin processes payout weekly.
Admin maintains platform quality, verifies tutors, resolves disputes, and monitors performance.
Admin logs in with admin credentials. Sees dashboard overview: new applications, pending bookings, revenue today, support tickets.
Opens "Pending Applications" list. Reviews each: checks degree, photo, subjects. Approves or rejects. System notifies tutor.
Views all active bookings. Checks for issues: session not started, tutor no-show, payment stuck.
Student or tutor files a complaint. Admin reviews both sides. Can issue refund, reassign tutor, or take no action.
Weekly: Admin reviews completed sessions. Calculates tutor earnings (after platform commission). Marks payouts as sent.
Updates homepage banner, FAQ content, service pages, pricing. Changes go live immediately after save.
Reviews weekly report: new signups, bookings, revenue, top performing tutors, dropout rates.
Sends bulk email to all students about promotions OR to tutors about policy updates.
Student pays securely. Platform takes commission. Tutor receives earnings. Refunds handled transparently.
After selecting session plan, student clicks "Proceed to Payment". Sees order summary with breakdown.
Student chooses from: JazzCash, EasyPaisa, Credit/Debit Card, Bank Transfer. Enters payment details.
System sends request to payment gateway. Gateway processes and returns success or failure response.
If success: booking confirmed, invoice generated, email sent to student, notification to tutor.
If failure: student shown error message with reason. Option to retry with same or different method.
Platform commission (e.g. 15%) automatically calculated and set aside. Remainder marked as tutor earnings.
Admin initiates weekly payout. Tutor receives payment via bank transfer/JazzCash. Marked as "Paid" in system.
Student requests refund from dashboard (valid within 48hrs of payment for unused sessions).
Admin checks: Was trial used? Was session conducted? Approves or declines refund.
Approved refund processed via original payment method within 3-5 business days. Email confirmation sent.
A booked session is conducted smoothly from reminder to completion with notes and review.
System sends email + SMS to both student and tutor: "Your session is tomorrow at [Time]. Tutor: [Name]."
System sends WhatsApp message + push notification: "Your session starts in 1 hour. Click here to join."
At T-15 minutes: Zoom/Meet link sent via email and shown in dashboard. Link is session-specific and expires after session.
Student clicks link, enters virtual classroom. Sees tutor name and subject on waiting screen.
Tutor joins and starts the session. System logs session start time. Recording begins (if opted in).
Tutor teaches using screen share, whiteboard, and documents. Student can ask questions. Homework discussed.
Tutor or student ends call. System logs session end time. Duration calculated.
Within 2 hours of session, tutor uploads session summary and any materials. Visible to student in dashboard.
Tutor assigns next homework via dashboard. System notifies student: "New homework assigned by [Tutor]."
System sends review request to student 30 minutes after session ends: "How was your session with [Tutor]?"
Student selects stars (1-5) and writes review. Review appears on tutor profile after moderation.
Session status changes to "Completed". Tutor earnings updated. Next session in series automatically scheduled.
ID, Name, Email, Phone, Role (student/tutor/admin), City, CreatedAt, Status
UserID, Subjects[], Grades[], Boards[], HourlyRate, Mode, Gender, Bio, Education[], Rating, IsVerified
UserID, Grade, Board, ParentName, City, PreferredGender, PreferredMode
ID, StudentID, TutorID, SessionType (trial/paid), Date, TimeSlot, Duration, Status, Amount
ID, BookingID, Amount, Commission, TutorEarning, Method, Status, TransactionRef, PaidAt
ID, BookingID, StudentID, TutorID, Rating(1-5), Comment, CreatedAt, IsVisible
ID, SenderID, ReceiverID, Content, Attachments[], SentAt, ReadAt
ID, BookingID, StartTime, EndTime, MeetLink, RecordingURL, Notes, HomeworkID
ID, UserID, Type, Message, Channel (email/sms/push), SentAt, ReadAt

Use this document as the source of truth for: 1. Figma design handoff — each page and component is defined above. 2. Developer specifications — all features, data fields, and workflows are documented. 3. QA testing — each workflow step can be converted into a test case. 4. Client presentation — share Section 3 and Section 5 for stakeholder review.
